text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (There's this girl...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (Someone I've always been watching...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Trainer! I'm ready for another fun workout
today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Cause muscles make your worries go away! Let's
hustle this muscle to the max!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (I've always watched her victories.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A sports drink really hits the spot after a nice run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
(I've looked up to her all this time. But inside my
admiration... I always hid my true feelings.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (What I've really wanted is...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I've always wanted to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, Mejiro Ryan and I begin working
to tackle the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her talent and physique are among the best, even
within the famed Mejiro family. But the problem
is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Please help me train my mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was born into the Mejiro family, so there have
always been high expectations for my future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I've never been a match for Mejiro
McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's amazing—the top in the family and a true
high-class lady!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Fast, strong, a hard worker... On top of being
elegant, she always has her style on point.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We're both Mejiros, but she's on another level.
Just comparing the two of us makes me want to
give up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I wanna break out on my own! I came to
Tracen Academy to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've always wanted to enter the Classics and stand
alongside McQueen as a strong racer! Please help
me!
choice_data_list: Do you think you're ready for it?
Do you think you're ready for it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: W-well, when you say it like that, I'm not sure...
choice_data_list: You can't show weakness in the Twinkle Series.
You can't show weakness in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, right, sorry... That's an old habit of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Even my family said that with my excellent
physique, I'd be a shoo-in for the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't live up to their expectations in
scrimmages. I can't even get good results in
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I want to do something about it! That's the truth!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know you can help me become the racer I want
to be. I need you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan isn't lying. She's determined.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. With you so adamant, Ryan, I'm the one
who should be concerned about my future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm delighted to see that you've made up your
mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But becoming your ideal self is no simple task.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I understand that, but... I won't hide from it
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become the kind of racer that even
you'll respect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That's why... I wanna race you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is that right? I'm delighted to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's truly splendid seeing you come this far. I await
your challenge.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let us meet again at the right time and place—on
the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Classics will certainly be something to look
forward to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! I acted so silly in front of
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay... It's okay... Right? Yeah, as long as I
back up my words with action...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan's legs are shaking. Her physical fitness is in
perfect form, but her spirit needs to catch up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I think of how I can help her improve...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, I just saw what happened. You must have
been shaking in your cleats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Ines Fujin. She's Ryan's friend, roommate, and
peer.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to get lost in thought when you're
reaching hard for something. Better to think
nothing at all.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
How about we do some running? I'll be your
partner!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Training, huh... Yeah, getting these muscles
pumped will help clear my head.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Is that okay with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yeah! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Let's run, Ines! We're gonna be working hard all
the way to our debut!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wow... Ryan, you're really, really fast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, Ryan becomes a blur in the
distance. When the pressure's off, she's incredibly
fast.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a "glass ace." Spectacular physique or not,
she could break at any moment if her heart
doesn't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll need to draw out her courage and train her to
become a full-fledged star.
